title: viola pitouchaoensis
intro: Viola pitouchaoensis, also known as the Chinese marsh violet or Peking violet, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the violet family. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola pitouchaoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Viola pitouchaoensis include dried roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, decoctions, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
